top_signals.title: Stocks Fall on AI Jitters and as Oil Pushes Higher: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell as unease over ever-higher artificial intelligence spending outweighed an otherwise strong earnings report from Alphabet Inc., while rising crude prices pushed bond yields higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI Debt Competing with Treasuries Is Adding to Lofty US Yields
top_signals.summary: The US 30-year bond yield has held above 5% for the longest stretch since the start of the financial crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump Allies Eye SVB Review as Path to Oust a Fed Governor - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Trump Allies Eye SVB Review as Path to Oust a Fed Governor  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Botox maker Galderma sees early boost from 'Ozempic face' trend as GLP-1 use climbs, CEO says
top_signals.summary: The aestetics company hope increased GLP-1 use will fuel demand for treatments addressing facial volume loss, sometimes dubbed "Ozempic face."
